steps.title: Identify what Macready and Keene have in common
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize a similarity between the two figures. The notes show both were actor-managers: they each managed their own theater and starred in productions there.

steps.title: Find which choice shows this parallel
steps.content: Choice B names both figures and presents them with parallel roles and actions—both actor-managers who managed theaters where they also performed. Choices A, C, and D either omit a figure, misrepresent the facts, or emphasize differences rather than similarities. That matches choice B — B is correct.
